hero.title: Primary School
hero.subtitle: Nurturing young minds with love, care, and quality education for Classes I-V

overview.title: Welcome to Primary School
overview.description: Our Primary School program (Classes I-V) provides a nurturing and stimulating environment where young learners develop foundational skills, curiosity, and a love for learning. We focus on holistic development through a balanced curriculum that addresses academic, social, emotional, and physical growth.

teachingApproach.title: Play-Based Learning
teachingApproach.description: Learning through play, exploration, and hands-on activities that make education enjoyable and effective.

teachingApproach.title: Collaborative Activities
teachingApproach.description: Group projects and teamwork that develop social skills and cooperative learning habits.

teachingApproach.title: Multiple Intelligences
teachingApproach.description: Teaching methods that cater to different learning styles and intelligences.

teachingApproach.title: Emotional Development
teachingApproach.description: Focus on emotional intelligence, self-awareness, and interpersonal skills.

gradeLevels.title: Grade Level Overview
gradeLevels.description: Our progressive curriculum builds skills and knowledge year by year

levels.description: Building strong foundations in reading, writing, and basic arithmetic through play-based learning.
Developing core academic skills while encouraging creativity and social development.
Strengthening conceptual understanding across subjects with hands-on learning experiences.
Applying knowledge to real-world situations and developing critical thinking skills.
Consolidating learning and preparing students for the transition to middle school.

curriculum.title: Primary School Curriculum
curriculum.description: A balanced and comprehensive curriculum designed for young learners

coreSubjects.name: English Language
coreSubjects.description: Reading, writing, speaking, and listening skills development

specialSubjects.name: Music
specialSubjects.description: Introduction to rhythm, melody, and instruments

specialSubjects.name: Physical Education
specialSubjects.description: Development of motor skills and healthy habits

specialSubjects.name: Computer Science
specialSubjects.description: Basic digital literacy and coding concepts

assessmentMethods.description: Ongoing evaluation through classwork, projects, quizzes, and observations
Term-end examinations to evaluate comprehensive understanding

activities.title: Co-Curricular Activities
activities.description: Enriching experiences beyond the classroom for holistic development

specialPrograms.title: Reading Program
specialPrograms.description: Develops reading habits through our leveled library system and reading challenges.

specialPrograms.title: Math Lab
specialPrograms.description: Hands-on mathematics learning with manipulatives and practical applications.

specialPrograms.title: Global Awareness
specialPrograms.description: Introduction to different cultures, languages, and global perspectives.

specialPrograms.title: Eco Warriors
specialPrograms.description: Environmental education and sustainability practices for young learners.

annualEvents.name: Sports Day
annualEvents.description: Track and field events for all students

parentInvolvement.title: Parent-Teacher Meetings
parentInvolvement.description: Regular meetings to discuss student progress and development

parentInvolvement.title: Reading Partners
parentInvolvement.description: Parent participation in reading activities and library programs

parentInvolvement.title: Class Events
parentInvolvement.description: Parents invited to special class presentations and celebrations

parentInvolvement.title: Volunteer Opportunities
parentInvolvement.description: Parents can volunteer for field trips and special activities

facilities.title: Primary School Facilities
facilities.description: Purpose-built spaces designed for young learners
classroomFeatures: Interactive whiteboards and digital learning tools
Safety features designed for young children
specializedAreas: Primary Science Lab with child-safe equipment
Art Room with various creative materials
Indoor Play Area for rainy days

safetyMeasures.title: Health Room
safetyMeasures.description: Staffed with trained nurse for first aid

tourCta.title: Schedule a Campus Tour
tourCta.description: Experience our primary school facilities firsthand

admissionsCta.title: Begin Your Child's Educational Journey
admissionsCta.description: Join our primary school community and give your child the foundation for a lifetime of learning and success.
